title: Light Smooth GUI
description: Adds a light smooth GUI to Minecraft
body:
![banner](https://git.sr.ht/~aeldit/MC-Resource-Packs/blob/main/images/banner_lgui.png)

## This pack adds a smooth light GUI to every container and screen in the game

![example_image](https://git.sr.ht/~aeldit/MC-Resource-Packs/blob/main/images/main_menu_light.jpg)
